title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Cars24 - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Cars24 - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Cars24 family as a Backend Developer in Pimpri-Chinchwad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Cars24:
Cars24 is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cars24!
